data.title: Double Pyramid Trouble
data.statement:
You are given a number N.

Your task is to print a double alphabet pyramid pattern.
For each row i (starting from 1), print the i-th uppercase letter of the alphabet repeated i times.

Each row must be printed twice, forming two identical pyramids side-by-side separated by spaces.

The first row starts with A, the second row with B, the third with C, and so on.

The pattern continues for N rows.

testCases.title: Test 1
testCases.testOut:
A      A
BB    BB
CCC  CCC
DDDDDDDD

testCases.title: Test 2
testCases.testOut:
A        A
BB      BB
CCC    CCC
DDDD  DDDD
EEEEEEEEEE

testCases.title: Validator 2
testCases.testOut:
A            A
BB          BB
CCC        CCC
DDDD      DDDD
EEEEE    EEEEE
FFFFFF  FFFFFF
GGGGGGGGGGGGGG

testCases.title: Test 4
testCases.testOut:
A          A
BB        BB
CCC      CCC
DDDD    DDDD
EEEEE  EEEEE
FFFFFFFFFFFF

testCases.title: Validator 4
testCases.testOut:
A                  A
BB                BB
CCC              CCC
DDDD            DDDD
EEEEE          EEEEE
FFFFFF        FFFFFF
GGGGGGG      GGGGGGG
HHHHHHHH    HHHHHHHH
IIIIIIIII  IIIIIIIII
JJJJJJJJJJJJJJJJJJJJ

data.stubGenerator:
read N:int
write print the pyramids
data.outputDescription:
Print N lines.

For each line i:

Print the i-th uppercase alphabet character repeated i times.

Add spaces.

Print the same pattern again on the same line.

lastVersion.statementHTML:
Goal

You are given a number N.

Your task is to print a double alphabet pyramid pattern.
For each row i (starting from 1), print the i-th uppercase letter of the alphabet repeated i times.

Each row must be printed twice, forming two identical pyramids side-by-side separated by spaces.

The first row starts with A, the second row with B, the third with C, and so on.

The pattern continues for N rows.
Input
An integer N.
Output
Print N lines.

For each line i:

Print the i-th uppercase alphabet character repeated i times.

Add spaces.

Print the same pattern again on the same line.
Constraints
1 ≤ 𝑁≤ 26
Example
Input
4
Output
A      A
BB    BB
CCC  CCC
DDDDDDDD
